title: Hazara Falls
tagline: Hazara Falls — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Hajra Falls is a waterfall 191 km from Nagpur, 50 km from Gondia and close to the Gondia district in India.
overview.description: Hajra Falls is a waterfall 191 km from Nagpur, 50 km from Gondia and close to the Gondia district in India. Hajra Falls, in Salekasa tehsil, is a tourist attraction during the rainy season. It is located 1 km from Darekasa railway station.

topPlaces.name: Salekasa
topPlaces.description: Salekasa (Marathi: सालेकसा) is a village and a tehsil in the Deori subdivision of Gondia district in Nagpur division in the Berar region in the state of Maharashtra, India. In 2020, a cache of explosives and weapons were found in a Naxal hideout in Salekasa.

topPlaces.name: Chandsuraj
topPlaces.description: Chandsuraj is a village located in Salekasa, within the Gondiya district of Maharashtra, India. Its population is 626 as of 2011.

items.note: Salekasa (Marathi: सालेकसा) is a village and a tehsil in the Deori subdivision of Gondia district in Nagpur division in the Berar region in the state of Maharashtra, India. In 2020, a cache of explosives and weapons were found in a Naxal hideout in Salekasa.
Chandsuraj is a village located in Salekasa, within the Gondiya district of Maharashtra, India. Its population is 626 as of 2011.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hazara Falls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hazara Falls is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hazara Falls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (121 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (110 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hazara Falls?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hazara Falls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hazara Falls?
faq.a: Stays in Hazara Falls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hazara Falls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Salekasa, Chandsuraj.
